item.title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Visit Site www.memorycardrestore.com and download Mac Memory Card Restore software that allows most inexpensive and venture less way for users in collecting back their important video clips and audios from any SDHC plus card. Comprehensive picture data recovery utility easily recovers mp3 files data from multimedia card.

[read more]

item.title: Recover Deleted FAT Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Deleted FAT Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Deleted FAT Files
(Utilities)
Recover deleted files through an award winning software that retrieves all important pictures, audio, songs, video, clips files folders from damaged SATA, SCSI, IDE, ZIP, ATA hard disk formatted in FAT32, FAT, FAT16, VFAT partitions. This product helps to rescue information lost due to unexpected shutdown, software malfunction and file directory deletion. Utility supports all extensions like jpg, doc, ppt, xls, mdb, rar, exe, zip, ini etc which are accidently removed via DOS command prompt. Retrieval application helps to retrieves accidently deleted system files like boot records, MBR, DBR tables, root directories, dll from iSCSI, USB, WDC, digital media hard drives, pen drives or memory card.Application can recover deleted PowerPoint, word, excel, photo, email and all type of other documents which have been emptied or bypassed from Recycle Bin after pressing Shift + del key. No technical knowledge is required to operate this software because it comes with simple to use graphical user interface which supports all Windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. Its inbuilt help option helps you to recoup your significant data through step by step instructions. Program is safe to use because it does not attempt any risky repairs to the disk while searching missing files. It helps million of users to get back their data caused by any unknown disaster.Important Features: * Less time consuming to recover your data through two search options. * Extracts your images, documents even the system is no longer boots. * Comes with plug n play functionality. * Supports retrieval of compressed files. * No technical knowledge is required to operate this tool. * Capable to get back boot.ini, MBR, DBR tables and root directory. * Recover files with their date, time, and location. * Dynamic and multi disk support.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Deleted FAT Files
(Utilities)
Recover deleted files through an award winning software that retrieves all important pictures, audio, songs, video, clips files folders from damaged SATA, SCSI, IDE, ZIP, ATA hard disk formatted in FAT32, FAT, FAT16, VFAT partitions. This product helps to rescue information lost due to unexpected shutdown, software malfunction and file directory deletion. Utility supports all extensions like jpg, doc, ppt, xls, mdb, rar, exe, zip, ini etc which are accidently removed via DOS command prompt. Retrieval application helps to retrieves accidently deleted system files like boot records, MBR, DBR tables, root directories, dll from iSCSI, USB, WDC, digital media hard drives, pen drives or memory card.Application can recover deleted PowerPoint, word, excel, photo, email and all type of other documents which have been emptied or bypassed from Recycle Bin after pressing Shift + del key. No technical knowledge is required to operate this software because it comes with simple to use graphical user interface which supports all Windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. Its inbuilt help option helps you to recoup your significant data through step by step instructions. Program is safe to use because it does not attempt any risky repairs to the disk while searching missing files. It helps million of users to get back their data caused by any unknown disaster.Important Features: * Less time consuming to recover your data through two search options. * Extracts your images, documents even the system is no longer boots. * Comes with plug n play functionality. * Supports retrieval of compressed files. * No technical knowledge is required to operate this tool. * Capable to get back boot.ini, MBR, DBR tables and root directory. * Recover files with their date, time, and location. * Dynamic and multi disk support.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover Deleted FAT Files
(Utilities)
Recover deleted files through an award winning software that retrieves all important pictures, audio, songs, video, clips files folders from damaged SATA, SCSI, IDE, ZIP, ATA hard disk formatted in FAT32, FAT, FAT16, VFAT partitions. This product helps to rescue information lost due to unexpected shutdown, software malfunction and file directory deletion. Utility supports all extensions like jpg, doc, ppt, xls, mdb, rar, exe, zip, ini etc which are accidently removed via DOS command prompt. Retrieval application helps to retrieves accidently deleted system files like boot records, MBR, DBR tables, root directories, dll from iSCSI, USB, WDC, digital media hard drives, pen drives or memory card.Application can recover deleted PowerPoint, word, excel, photo, email and all type of other documents which have been emptied or bypassed from Recycle Bin after pressing Shift + del key. No technical knowledge is required to operate this software because it comes with simple to use graphical user interface which supports all Windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8, 7 operating system. Its inbuilt help option helps you to recoup your significant data through step by step instructions. Program is safe to use because it does not attempt any risky repairs to the disk while searching missing files. It helps million of users to get back their data caused by any unknown disaster.Important Features: * Less time consuming to recover your data through two search options. * Extracts your images, documents even the system is no longer boots. * Comes with plug n play functionality. * Supports retrieval of compressed files. * No technical knowledge is required to operate this tool. * Capable to get back boot.ini, MBR, DBR tables and root directory. * Recover files with their date, time, and location. * Dynamic and multi disk support.

[read more]

item.title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]
item.description:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]

item.title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]
item.description:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4, KDE5 and KDE6 (deb package only).

[read more]

item.title: QTrans [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: QTrans [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: tkbj
item.itunes:summary:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]
item.description:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QTrans
(Utilities)
QTrans is a word translator (offline dictionary frontend for Babylon, StarDict and Dictd dictionaries) written in Qt5/KF5 or Qt5.
It uses following dictionaries:
- Babylon (*.dic, *.bgl),
- StarDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.ifo),
- Dictd and FreeDict (*.dict, *.dict.dz: *.index) as well as plain text (*.dic.txt).

Plain text dictionaries should have the format: "expression [Tab] definition".

https://sourceforge.net/projects/qtrans0/
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qtrans
[read more]

item.title: Mac Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Picture Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Picture Restore
(Utilities)
Hey! Now Mac Picture Restore software recovers corrupted images, pictures, pics and snaps from apple based devices without any prior technical assistance. www.memorycardrestore.com represents restoration application that helps you in regaining and restoring deleted data files and folders at their specified location within few clicks of mouse.

[read more]

[read more]
